dsl_rule.translation_notes: N-day breakout system implemented using price highs/lows compared to previous bar. Entry on new highs (long) or new lows (short). Exit conditions reversed as opposites per standard breakout logic. Lookback period defaulted to 1-bar swing for minimal lag as per signal intent. Signal emphasizes no lag vs moving average systems, hence simple price-based breakouts used.

backtest_rule.reason: N-day breakout system implemented using price highs/lows compared to previous bar. Entry on new highs (long) or new lows (short). Exit conditions reversed as opposites per standard breakout logic. Lookback period defaulted to 1-bar swing for minimal lag as per signal intent. Signal emphasizes no lag vs moving average systems, hence simple price-based breakouts used.

source_rule_text: N-day breakout and swing breakout systems generate trading signals when prices make new highs or lows, with no lag compared to moving average systems.
